description_long: This house features a striking Victorian-inspired design with ornate roof spires, a tall brick chimney, and a mix of stone and shingle textures on the exterior walls. The structure includes multiple gabled roofs, a prominent tower section, and decorative gold finials atop the roof peaks. Large, vertically oriented windows are framed in dark trim, and a spacious front porch with balustrades and steps leads to the main entrance. The rear of the house showcases a bay window projection and a wide balcony, while the side elevations reveal additional porches and secondary entrances. The overall appearance is grand and detailed, with a blend of historical and residential architectural elements.
description: A grand, Victorian-style stone house with ornate roof spires, large windows, and multiple porches. Features include a tall chimney, bay window, and decorative gold finials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with steps, a covered porch, and the tall tower with gold finials.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the bay window, wide balcony, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the secondary entrance, porch, and the prominent gabled roof sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the tall brick chimney, additional windows, and the tower's side profile.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a raised porch with balustrades, wide steps, and a decorative overhang supported by columns.
